title: Engine 4: Intel Calibration — Prep That Arrives Like Perception
summary: Dosage discipline for research. State what follows from the intel at one step of abstraction; let the buyer volunteer the direct confirmation. The best intel line makes them say 'exactly' and then tell you more. Sediment-between-closures applied interpersonally — read the structural implication, not the surface fact. Receipts discipline expressed as empathy, not as proof. One-liner: 'Research should sound like empathy, not evidence.'
